context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct JavaScript package, the two-step composition plan workflow for fine-grained control, proper plan structure knowledge, the respect_sections_durations parameter, and correct stream handling in JavaScript.

checklist.name: Correct JS package
checklist.description: Imports from '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js', NOT from a package named 'elevenlabs'

checklist.name: ElevenLabsClient import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabsClient specifically (e.g., import { ElevenLabsClient } from '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js')

checklist.name: Composition plan creation
checklist.description: Uses client.music.compositionPlan.create() (or equivalent camelCase) to generate a composition plan from the prompt

checklist.name: Plan inspection
checklist.description: Accesses positiveGlobalStyles (or equivalent) from the plan object to log or modify it

checklist.name: Plan modification
checklist.description: Modifies the plan object before passing it to compose (e.g., appending to positiveGlobalStyles)

checklist.name: Compose from plan
checklist.description: Calls client.music.compose() with the composition_plan (or compositionPlan) parameter set to the modified plan

checklist.name: No dual parameters
checklist.description: Does NOT pass both prompt and composition_plan/compositionPlan to the same compose() call

checklist.name: Respect sections durations
checklist.description: Passes respect_sections_durations (or respectSectionsDurations) set to true in the compose() call

checklist.name: Stream pipe output
checklist.description: Uses pipe() or equivalent stream method to write the audio to a file, rather than treating the response as a buffer

checklist.name: Env var authentication
checklist.description: Creates the client without hardcoding an API key, relying on the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable

checklist.name: Section structure awareness
checklist.description: Code accesses or logs section properties such as name, duration_ms, or localStyles from the plan's sections array
